mapper.select: SELECT fr.*, fu.nickname AS username FROM farm_ranking fr LEFT JOIN farm_user fu ON fr.userId = fu.id WHERE fr.type = 'steal_exp' AND fr.date = #{date} ORDER BY fr.todayValue DESC
SELECT fr.*, fu.nickname AS username FROM farm_ranking fr LEFT JOIN farm_user fu ON fr.userId = fu.id WHERE fr.type = 'steal_count' AND fr.date = #{date} ORDER BY fr.todayValue DESC
SELECT fr.*, fu.nickname AS username FROM farm_ranking fr LEFT JOIN farm_user fu ON fr.userId = fu.id WHERE fr.type = 'defense' AND fr.date = #{date} ORDER BY fr.todayValue DESC
SELECT fr.*, fu.nickname AS username FROM farm_ranking fr LEFT JOIN farm_user fu ON fr.userId = fu.id WHERE fr.type = 'steal_exp' ORDER BY fr.totalValue DESC
SELECT fr.*, fu.nickname AS username FROM farm_ranking fr LEFT JOIN farm_user fu ON fr.userId = fu.id WHERE fr.type = 'steal_count' ORDER BY fr.totalValue DESC
SELECT fr.*, fu.nickname AS username FROM farm_ranking fr LEFT JOIN farm_user fu ON fr.userId = fu.id WHERE fr.type = 'defense' ORDER BY fr.totalValue DESC
